ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the study */,
  "study_design" INTEGER /* ID of the study design */,
  "comparison_groups" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison groups */,
  "key_findings" TEXT /* Key findings from the study */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the study began */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the study ended */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the study */,
  "published_in" TEXT /* Journal or publication where the study results were published */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_study_design FOREIGN KEY ("study_design") REFERENCES study_designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_comparison_groups FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_groups") REFERENCES comparison_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the study design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study design */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the study */,
  "blinding" TEXT /* Type of blinding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comparison group */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the group */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for including participants in the group */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for excluding participants from the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public or private */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_key_findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key finding */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the finding is related to */,
  "finding_text" TEXT /* Text of the key finding */,
  "finding_date" TEXT /* Date the finding was recorded */,
  "finding_category" TEXT /* Category of the finding (e.g., safety, efficacy) */,
  "statistical_significance" TEXT /* Statistical significance of the finding */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the finding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_key_findings_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_designs_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the mapping entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_designs_mapping_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES study_designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_designs_mapping_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
